arts.ttl: Barcelona's five best January transfers of all time
arts.sum: Davids left the club to join Inter on a free transfer in 2004, but Barcelona won La Liga the following season and Rijkaard’s eventual success at Camp Nou may not have been possible without the legendary midfielder. Jose Manuel Pinto spent 10 years at Celta Vigo before joining Barcelona on loan in January 2008.
